phase3_daemon_schedule_alignment.gap_at_closing_window_entry: At 07:00Z: gap for 3469930.1/3469931.1 will be exactly 2.0h (entry threshold)
phase3_daemon_schedule_alignment.diagnosis: Daemon is actively running. P26H's UNMATCHED classification was based on a point-in-time read at 02:54Z — 4.1h before the closing window opened. This was a premature evaluation. Risk factor: past 9.9h gap on 2026-05-20 shows daemon can stop; if daemon stops before 07:00Z, prediction fails.

phase4_prediction_logic_audit.prediction_assumption: Daemon will continue running through 07:00Z-09:00Z window
phase4_prediction_logic_audit.explanation: P26G correctly identified that 3469930.1 and 3469931.1 have pregame snapshots and game_time=09:00Z, so closing window=07:00Z-09:00Z. The prediction of expected_new_pairs_today=2 is conditionally correct IF daemon runs through 07:00Z. P26G's logic is too optimistic because it does not account for: (1) the possibility of daemon outage (seen: 9.9h gap on 2026-05-20), (2) the timing gap between prediction and window opening (02:09Z prediction → 07:00Z window = 4.85h). P26H evaluated at 02:54Z, classified UNMATCHED prematurely. The BROKEN label is premature — correctness TBD after 09:00Z.

phase5_coverage_recheck.note: Daemon is running; history growing. 10 new rows since P26H (2902→2912). COMPLETE_PAIR unchanged at 220. Bootstrap remains blocked.

final_classification_rationale: Analysis performed at 03:09Z, 3.85h BEFORE the 07:00Z closing window for 3469930.1/3469931.1. Cannot confirm or deny P26G prediction at this time. Daemon IS running. P26H's UNMATCHED was premature. Secondary risk: daemon showed 9.9h gap on 2026-05-20. Recommend: re-evaluate after 09:00Z to confirm if CLV pairs formed.
